capstone.title: Senior Capstone
capstone.subtitle: Full-Stack Application
capstone.description: My capstone applies every dimension of the CS curriculum to one cohesive product — spanning requirements gathering, system design, database architecture, REST API development, and a React frontend. The project is built using Agile/Scrum methodology with iterative sprints and stakeholder reviews.
capstone.phase_description: Currently in the architecture design phase: defining the entity-relationship diagram, API contracts, and component hierarchy before any code is written — the same discipline I practiced on the Dress Web Store.

projects.title: Dress Web Store
projects.description: E-commerce platform with product and order management. Designed the database schema, implemented CRUD APIs, and produced Figma UI mockups — demonstrating end-to-end SDLC skills.

projects.title: Daily Diary
projects.description: Journaling web app with a built-in habit tracker. Users create, update, and visualize trends in personal data — demonstrating front-end data visualization and user-centered design.

projects.title: Creative Newsletter
projects.description: Responsive newsletter platform with Email API integration for automated distribution. Showcases API consumption, cross-functional development, and responsive design.
